title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese presents three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for improving productivity with Claude Code: LLM Knowledge Bases, Auto-Research, and Context Engineering. The video aims to make Karpathy's methods accessible and actionable for developers building with Claude.
